text: The subject is located in a neighborhood on the eastside of Colfax, IL. It is a single family detatched manufactured ranch designed house. Colfax is a village in McLean County, IL. The population was 996 in the 2020 census. It is part of the Bloomington–Normal Metropolitan Statistical Area. The subject neighborhood is bordered to the North by E 2000 North Rd, to the South by E 1900 North Rd, East by agricultural land, and West by agricultural land.
